title: 双猫追日
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: MiaoTarot card-back artwork
Primary request: Two recognizable domestic cats chase each other's tails around a small warm sun, forming one circular emblem.
Style/medium: hand-inked colored-pencil and dry-gouache storybook tarot illustration on tactile paper, slightly imperfect and sophisticated rather than glossy fantasy AI art; warm parchment, apricot, ochre, dusty lavender, and charcoal.
Composition/framing: native portrait 5:7 from the start; strong central feline motif readable at 80 pixels wide; quiet full-bleed edges; 180-degree rotational balance with no detectable upright direction.
Output: native portrait 5:7 full-bleed card artwork, preferably 1020x1428 pixels. Compose for the tall canvas from the start; never generate a square composition for later cropping, stretching, or outpainting.
Constraints: no printed card border, title, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, signature, fake glyphs, or pseudo-text. Keep faces, ears, paws, tails, and essential symbols inside the central safe area. No humans.
Avoid: generic occult filigree dominating the cats, tiny hidden cat symbols, photorealism, 3D render, cropped anatomy, extra limbs, malformed paws, busy corners, or an obvious top and bottom.
